M-022.NAME: device-provisioning-api
M-022.owns: user-facing device management, stealth-aware config retrieval and device-bound provisioning APIs

exports.fn-create-device: Creates a device and provisions a distinct peer or rejects on plan limit
exports.fn-rotate-device-config: Reissues peer material for one logical device while invalidating the old config
exports.fn-revoke-device: Revokes a specific device and frees or preserves a slot according to policy
exports.fn-download-stealth-config: Returns AmneziaWG config and QR payload with CLIENT_PROFILE and preshared-key parity

M-022.hotspot: H-017: QR/raw config endpoints must not diverge in profile or preshared-key content
